name: burnedwolf
description: Özel Siber Ağ Geçidi ve Tünelleme Sistemi
author: Developer

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator ./ --output ./ --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.4 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.4 --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-index-shift true --split-strings true --split-strings-chunk-length 5 --disable-console-output true --exclude node_modules
